get.summary: Download the original indexed GPS source file
Download the indexed GPS source file as GPX

422.description: Unsupported or non-convertible source track format

numberOfPhysicalPoints.description: Number of physical vertices in this track-data variant's geometry.

track.description: Coordinate arrays [[lng, lat, elevation], ...]. Custom serialized by LineStringSerializer for bandwidth efficiency.

metadataVersion.description: UI metadata schema version. Only version 2 is supported.

paramGroups.description: Parameter groups keyed by group id.

params.description: Parameter metadata keyed by SQL parameter name.

resolvedFilterRef.description: Resolved filter template ref used to load options.

widget.description: Widget used to edit this parameter.

optional.description: Whether the parameter may be left blank.

originFilterRef.description: Template filter where this effective parameter metadata was defined.

relation.description: Relationship between the selected filter and the parameter metadata origin.

optionsSource.description: Metadata source for widgets that need selectable options.
